label: Market study
hint: Size it, map it, rank it
desc: Size and map a market — charts, rankings and option comparisons.
note: Quantitative market work: carry the point on single charts (C06) and small multiples (C07), position players on a 2x2 (C12), and compare options in a table (C15) — every data slide action-titled (C05) with a source line.
